descFull: The 30 Days of Python programming challenge is a step-by-step guide to learn the Python programming language in 30 days. This challenge may take more than 100 days. Follow your own pace. These videos may help too: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7PNRuno1rzYPb1xLa4yktw
